title: How can I tell which server region my Monday.com account is in?
excerpt:
Hi guys, 
Monday.com support documentation re the Cross Account Copier features notes that “you can’t copy account info between accounts located in different regions”.  A quick Google search seems to indicate most (?) of…

posts.author: patrickfallon (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys,
Monday.com support documentation re the Cross Account Copier features notes that “you can’t copy account info between accounts located in different regions”. A quick Google search seems to indicate most (?) of Monday’s servers are in the US region, some in the EU. I am in New Zealand.
How can I tell which region’s servers my Monday.com / my client’s Monday.com are hosted on?

Cheers,
Patrick

posts.author: william.brochensque (William Brochensque Júnior)
posts.cookedHtml: Nevermind, figured it out on Administration > General
